\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\usetikzlibrary{shapes.misc,shapes.symbols,shapes.multipart}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \node[draw,rounded rectangle] at (0,0) {rounded};
  \node[draw,rounded rectangle,rounded rectangle west arc=concave,rounded rectangle east arc=none] at (4,0) {rounded opts};
  \node[draw,chamfered rectangle,chamfered rectangle corners={north west,south east}] at (8,0) {chamfered};
  \node[draw,cross out] at (12,0) {cross};
  \node[draw,strike out] at (16,0) {strike};
  \node[draw,magnifying glass,magnifying glass handle angle=-30,magnifying glass handle aspect=1.8] at (20,0) {mag};

  \node[draw,circle split] at (0,-4) {top\nodepart{lower}lower};
  \node[draw,circle solidus] at (4,-4) {top\nodepart{lower}lower};
  \node[draw,ellipse split] at (8,-4) {top\nodepart{lower}lower};
  \node[draw,diamond split,inner xsep=1cm] at (12,-4) {top\nodepart{lower}lower};
  \node[draw,rectangle split,rectangle split parts=4] at (16,-4) {one\nodepart{two}two\nodepart{three}three\nodepart{four}four};
  \node[draw,rectangle split,rectangle split parts=4,rectangle split horizontal] at (20,-4) {one\nodepart{two}two\nodepart{three}three\nodepart{four}four};
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{document}
